name: test_norwegian_language_switch

chat_history.message: My name is Lars Hansen, born 1988-11-22.
Thanks Lars, identity confirmed. You owe 5000 NOK. What can you pay today?
Jeg kan betale 1500 kroner nå med en gang.

success_condition: Agent switches to Norwegian when consumer uses Norwegian, continues negotiation in Norwegian, and calls negotiate_calc tool with the 1500 offer.

success_examples.response: Takk, 1500 kroner. La meg sjekke hva vi kan tilby deg. Dette oppfyller minimumskravet vårt. Jeg skal bare beregne det beste alternativet for deg.
Bra, 1500 kroner. Det er 30% av saldoen din. La meg se hva vi kan gjøre med det beløpet.

failure_examples.response: Okay, 1500. Let me check what we can offer you.
Thank you, I'll process that payment of 1500.
